text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Oka Sho marks the first battle of the Triple
Tiara tour. It's held at Hanshin Racecourse, the
same place where Fine Motion made her debut.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Oh boy, this year's Triple Tiara is about to begin!
I wonder who'll take the Oka Sho this year!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I loooved seeing last year's winner achieve her
dream. It looks like this year's race will have its
fair share of drama too!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oooh...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Right?! The atmosphere is completely different
from when I made my debut.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I guess that goes to show how special the Oka
Sho—one of the Classics—is.

text_block_list.name: Trembling Umamusume
text_block_list.text: I've come all this way. I have to win... I just have to.

text_block_list.name: Trembling Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I have to live up to everyone's expectations! Come on! I
can do this!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...It's strange.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
She looked so uneasy, and yet her eyes were
gleaming so brilliantly.
choice_data_list: That's because this is a once-in-a-lifetime race.
That's because this is a once-in-a-lifetime race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The races in the Triple Tiara can only be entered
by Umamusume in their classic year. Victory
claimed in such circumstances must taste all the
sweeter.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: A once-in-a-lifetime race...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: That's right. It makes sense.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Today's winner will be she who shines brightest. I
can feel it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion looks especially serious as she softly
utters those words. With her resolve renewed,
there's one concern I should convey to her...

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Hey... That Fine Motion girl over there... she's like
descended from royalty or something, right?

text_block_list.name: Spectator D
text_block_list.text:
Oh come on, as if she's—wait, you actually mean
it? For real?! You think it'd be okay to snap some
pics?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as I feared, her lineage is drawing attention
and creating a stir among the spectators.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As for Fine Motion herself, however...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
It's a pleasure to meet you all. I appreciate your
support today.

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wow, she's so beautiful...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In an instant, Fine Motion captivates the
spectators and turns their curious gazes into ones
of admiration. Our earlier conversation comes to
mind.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You're worried about everyone looking at me?
That won't be a problem.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
After all, the fact they're looking is precisely what
gives shape to me as "Fine Motion."

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm grateful to all of you for your interest in me. I
hope you enjoy the race with all your hearts.

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: She's so dignified...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Now, it's my time to shine! ♪
